panels.title: ⚙️ Modo Trading
panels.description: Clique para alternar entre REAL e DRY RUN

panels.title: 🏥 Health Check (Metric)
panels.description: Health status do BTC Trading Agent via Prometheus - Verde = Online

panels.title: 🩺 Connectivity Check
panels.description: HTTP endpoint connectivity - Verde = respondendo

panels.title: 🩺 Stall Detection (Last Decision Age)
panels.description: Tempo desde a última decisão. Verde < 5min, Amarelo 5-10min, Vermelho > 10min

panels.title: 🔄 Mudanças de Estado (24h)
panels.description: Número de mudanças de estado do agente (ON/OFF) nas últimas 24h

panels.title: 🧠 Decisões na Última Hora
panels.description: Total de decisões (BUY/SELL/HOLD) tomadas na última hora

panels.title: 📋 Decisões Recentes (Log Rolante)
panels.description: Últimas decisões do agente de trading em tempo real (atualiza a cada 15s)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(to_timestamp("timestamp") AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo', 'DD/MM HH24:MI') AS "Data/Hora",
  action,
  confidence,
  price,
  reason,
  executed
FROM btc.decisions
WHERE symbol = '$coin'
ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC
LIMIT 50

panels.title: 📊 Trades Recentes
panels.description: Trades executados recentemente com PnL

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo', 'DD/MM HH24:MI') AS "Data/Hora",
  side,
  price,
  size,
  pnl,
  pnl_pct,
  metadata->>'exit_reason' AS exit_reason,
  dry_run
FROM btc.trades
WHERE symbol = '$coin'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: 🧠 RAG Regime
panels.description: Regime detectado pela IA: -1=Bear, 0=Ranging, 1=Bull

panels.title: 🎯 RAG Confidence
panels.description: Confiança do regime detectado (0-100%)

panels.title: 📊 Bull vs Bear
panels.description: Percentual de padrões similares classificados como Bull, Bear ou Flat

panels.title: 📐 RAG Thresholds
panels.description: Buy/Sell thresholds ajustados pela IA

panels.title: 🔍 RAG Patterns
panels.description: Padrões similares encontrados e retorno médio

panels.title: 💹 Retorno 5m
panels.description: Retorno médio de 5 minutos nos padrões similares

targets.rawSql: SELECT TO_CHAR(to_timestamp(timestamp) AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo', 'DD/MM HH24:MI') AS "Data/Hora", regime AS "Regime", CONCAT('$', ROUND(price::numeric, 2)) AS "Preço", model AS "Modelo", plan_text AS "Análise" FROM btc.ai_plans WHERE symbol = '$coin' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT TO_CHAR(to_timestamp(timestamp) AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo', 'DD/MM HH24:MI') AS "Data/Hora", regime AS "Regime", CONCAT('$', ROUND(price::numeric, 2)) AS "Preço", model AS "Modelo", plan_text AS "Análise Completa" FROM btc.ai_plans WHERE symbol = '$coin' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 10

options.content:
📅 {{{Data/Hora}}} 🏷️ {{{Regime}}} 💰 {{{Preço}}} 🤖 {{{Modelo}}}
{{{Análise}}}

targets.rawSql:
SELECT 
  TO_CHAR(to_timestamp(timestamp) AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo', 'DD/MM HH24:MI') AS "Data/Hora",
  regime AS "Regime",
  CONCAT('$', ROUND(price::numeric, 2)) AS "Preço",
  model AS "Modelo",
  plan_text AS "Análise"
FROM btc.ai_plans 
WHERE symbol = 'BTC-USDT'
ORDER BY timestamp DESC 
LIMIT 1

panels.title: 📰 Sentimento Geral
panels.description: Sentimento médio das notícias: -1=Bearish, 0=Neutro, 1=Bullish

panels.title: 🎯 Confiança Média
panels.description: Confiança média da classificação de sentimento (0-1)

panels.title: 📊 Bullish vs Bearish
panels.description: Percentual de notícias classificadas como Bullish vs Bearish

panels.title: 📰 Notícias Analisadas
panels.description: Total de notícias analisadas nas últimas 24h

panels.title: 📈 Sentimento ao Longo do Tempo
panels.description: Evolução do sentimento das notícias

panels.title: 📝 Últimas Notícias Analisadas
panels.description: Notícias mais recentes com classificação de sentimento

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo', 'DD/MM HH24:MI') AS "Data/Hora",
  source AS "Fonte",
  title AS "Título",
  CASE WHEN sentiment > 0.1 THEN 'Bullish' WHEN sentiment < -0.1 THEN 'Bearish' ELSE 'Neutro' END AS "Sentimento",
  ROUND(sentiment::numeric, 2) AS "Score",
  ROUND(confidence::numeric, 2) AS "Confiança"
FROM btc.news_sentiment
WHERE coin = SPLIT_PART('$coin', '-', 1)
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 15

panels.title: ⚠️ Fetch Errors
panels.description: Total de erros ao buscar feeds RSS

options.content:
💰 Performance & ROI Desde {{{primeiro_trade}}}
{{{roi_arrow}}} {{{roi_pct}}}% ROI Total
Capital Inicial
$ {{{initial_capital}}}
USDT depositado
Equity Atual
$ {{{equity_total}}}
USDT + BTC valorizado
PnL Realizado
$ {{{pnl_total}}}
Soma de todos os trades
Win Rate
{{{win_rate}}}%
{{{wins}}}W / {{{losses}}}L
Saldos Exchange
{{{position_btc}}} BTC
$ {{{usdt_free}}} USDT
Preço Médio Entrada
$ {{{avg_entry}}}
BTC agora: $ {{{btc_price}}} ({{{entry_diff}}}%)
PnL 24h
$ {{{pnl_24h}}}
{{{trades_24h}}} trades hoje
Total Trades
{{{total_trades}}}
{{{buys}}} buys / {{{sells}}} sells
Progresso ROI {{{roi_pct}}}%
Melhor trade: $ {{{best_trade}}} Pior trade: $ {{{worst_trade}}} Dias operando: {{{dias_operando}}}

targets.rawSql:
WITH stats AS (
  SELECT
    100.00 AS initial_capital,
    count(*) AS total_trades,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE side='buy') AS buys,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE side='sell') AS sells,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE pnl > 0) AS wins,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE pnl < 0) AS losses,
    COALESCE(SUM(pnl), 0)::numeric(12,4) AS pnl_total,
    MAX(pnl)::numeric(10,4) AS best_trade,
    MIN(pnl)::numeric(10,4) AS worst_trade,
    to_timestamp(MIN(timestamp))::date AS first_trade_date
  FROM btc.trades
),
exchange AS (
  SELECT usdt_balance, btc_balance, btc_price, equity_usdt
  FROM btc.exchange_snapshots
  ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1
),
pnl24 AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pnl), 0)::numeric(12,4) AS pnl_24h, count(*) AS trades_24h
  FROM btc.trades WHERE to_timestamp(timestamp) >= NOW() - interval '24 hours'
),
entry AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
    (SUM(CASE WHEN side='buy' AND COALESCE(metadata->>'source','') != 'external_deposit' THEN funds ELSE 0 END)
     - SUM(CASE WHEN side='sell' THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(funds,0), size*price) ELSE 0 END))
    / NULLIF((SUM(CASE WHEN side='buy' AND COALESCE(metadata->>'source','') != 'external_deposit' THEN size ELSE 0 END)
              - SUM(CASE WHEN side='sell' THEN size ELSE 0 END)), 0), 0
  )::numeric(10,2) AS avg_entry
  FROM btc.trades
),
calc AS (
  SELECT
    s.initial_capital,
    s.total_trades, s.buys, s.sells, s.wins, s.losses,
    s.pnl_total, s.best_trade, s.worst_trade,
    TO_CHAR(s.first_trade_date, 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS primeiro_trade,
    (NOW()::date - s.first_trade_date) AS dias_operando,
    ROUND(CASE WHEN s.wins+s.losses>0 THEN 100.0*s.wins/(s.wins+s.losses) ELSE 0 END, 1) AS win_rate,
    ex.btc_balance AS position_btc,
    ROUND((ex.btc_balance * ex.btc_price)::numeric, 2) AS position_usdt,
    ROUND(ex.btc_price::numeric, 2) AS btc_price,
    ROUND(ex.usdt_balance::numeric, 2) AS usdt_free,
    e.avg_entry,
    ROUND(((ex.btc_price - e.avg_entry)/NULLIF(e.avg_entry,0)*100)::numeric, 2) AS entry_diff,
    ROUND(ex.equity_usdt::numeric, 2) AS equity_total,
    ROUND(((ex.equity_usdt - s.initial_capital) / s.initial_capital * 100)::numeric, 2) AS roi_pct,
    p24.pnl_24h, p24.trades_24h,
    10 AS n_entries
  FROM stats s
  CROSS JOIN exchange ex
  CROSS JOIN pnl24 p24
  CROSS JOIN entry e
)
SELECT
  c.*,
  CASE WHEN c.roi_pct >= 0 THEN '#73BF69' ELSE '#F2495C' END AS roi_color,
  CASE WHEN c.roi_pct >= 0 THEN '▲' ELSE '▼' END AS roi_arrow,
  CASE WHEN c.pnl_total >= 0 THEN '#73BF69' ELSE '#F2495C' END AS pnl_color,
  CASE WHEN c.pnl_24h >= 0 THEN '#73BF69' ELSE '#F2495C' END AS pnl24_color,
  CASE WHEN c.btc_price >= c.avg_entry THEN '#73BF69' ELSE '#F2495C' END AS entry_color,
  CASE WHEN c.roi_pct >= 0
    THEN 'linear-gradient(90deg, #73BF69, #56A64B)'
    ELSE 'linear-gradient(90deg, #F2495C, #CC3A4A)'
  END AS roi_gradient,
  LEAST(GREATEST(ABS(c.roi_pct), 1), 100) AS roi_bar_width
FROM calc c;
